title: Open field test
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"20sc","text":"Protocol for the open field test performed by rats","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"nbos","text":"All procedures were carried out following the guidelines on the ethical use of animals from the Council Directive of the European Communities (2010/63/EU) and were approved by the Italian Ministry of Health ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Place a rat in an open field (OF) arena (diameter 100 cm) and leave free exploration for 30 min
Measure total distance moved and time spent in the arena center during exploration by using Ethovision XT software.
Leave the rats in the behavioral room for acclimation for at least 1 hour before the test, and perform the marble burying test between 9:00 am and 16:00 pm.
creator: Ada Ledonne
